TEXT.source: translation of FormosanBank gitbook in Paiwan
TEXT.citation: Ruan, X. (2025). Paiwan translation of FormosanBank manual.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{gitbook_paiwan_transl, author={Ruan, X.}, title={Paiwan Translation of FormosanBank Manual}, year={2025}, note={Translation}}

S.FORM: kemuda itjen a pusaladj tua FormosanBank?
kemoda itjen a posaladj toa FormosanBank?
S.TRANSL: 為 FormosanBank 作出貢獻
Contributing to FormosanBank

S.FORM: tjara ljemaui a su ziriu maqati a pavai tua kindri pasusu ta CC-BY-NC a hulic (amilikan|ciniukukan) sa sicekaw itua wanglu.
tjara ljemaoi a so zirio maqati a pavai toa kindri pasoso ta CC-BY-NC a holic (amilikan|ciniokokan) sa sicekaw itoa wanglo.
S.TRANSL: 您必須同意將您的語料以開源 碼授權 CC-BY-NC(英語|華語) 進行發布。
You must agree for your data to be published with the open-source license CC-BY-NC (English | Chinese).

S.FORM: nu saljinga sun a cemekaw emaya tua malji mun a kindri parutua open-source ayaya, maqati a mazepzep katua ringraku tjanuamen.
no saljinga son a cemekaw emaya toa malji mon a kindri parotoa open-soorce ayaya, maqati a mazepzep katoa ringrako tjanoamen.
S.TRANSL: 若您希望使用其他 開源碼授權，請與我們討論。
If you prefer a different open-source license, please discuss with us.

S.FORM: kemuda timadju a cemekaw tua nisun a ziriu?
kemoda timadjo a cemekaw toa nison a zirio?
S.TRANSL: 他人可以如何使用您的語料?
What can people do with your data?

S.FORM: tjara pasusu tua kakudan nua FormosanBank nu macekaw tua ziriu:
tjara pasoso toa kakodan noa FormosanBank no macekaw toa zirio:
S.TRANSL: 任何人都可以在遵守以下限制 的情況下使用 FormosanBank 中的語料:
Anyone can use data in FormosanBank for any purpose, with the following restrictions:

S.FORM: timaimanga dikinay a paveli tua su ziriu.
timaimanga dikinay a paveli toa so zirio.
S.TRANSL: 誰也不能銷售您的語料。
Nobody can sell your data.

S.FORM: neka a maqati a paveli tua masan nisun a ziriu ta AI.
neka a maqati a paveli toa masan nison a zirio ta AI.
S.TRANSL: 沒有人能銷售以您的語料訓練 的人工智慧。
Nobody can sell artificial intelligence trained using your data.

S.FORM: tjara kiteku katua pakeljang tua su kindri nua ziriu a timaimanga nu macekaw tua su ziriu.
tjara kiteko katoa pakeljang toa so kindri noa zirio a timaimanga no macekaw toa so zirio.
S.TRANSL: 任何使用您的語料的人必須承 認您的作品。
Anyone who uses your data must acknowledge your work.

S.FORM: tjara nupasusu tua mareka kakudan, timaimanga maqati a cemekaw tua su ziriu itua:
tjara nopasoso toa mareka kakodan, timaimanga maqati a cemekaw toa so zirio itoa:
S.TRANSL: 只要遵守這些規則，任何人都 可以將您的資料用於:
As long as they follow those rules, anyone may use your data for:

S.FORM: kinkiw tua nanemanga
kinkiw toa nanemanga
S.TRANSL: 科學研究
Scientific research

S.FORM: vavelian nua bunka
vavelian noa bonka
S.TRANSL: 文化產品
Cultural products

S.FORM: lemingdjelj tua AI a sengsengan
lemingdjelj toa AI a sengsengan
S.TRANSL: 創建人工智慧
Creating artificial intelligence

S.FORM: nanema uli sikuda a sengsengan
nanema oli sikoda a sengsengan
S.TRANSL: 任何其他用途
Any other purpose

S.FORM: izua kisanvenecik saljinga tu macekaw seman siubai a sengsengan. nusaljinga sun tu maqati masan siubay a su sengsengan, tjumalji amen.
izoa kisanvenecik saljinga to macekaw seman siobai a sengsengan. nosaljinga son to maqati masan siobay a so sengsengan, tjomalji amen.
S.TRANSL: 有些作者希望允許商業用途。 如果您希望允許商業用途，請與我們討論。
Some authors wish to allow for commercial uses. If you wish to allow commercial uses, please discuss with us.

S.FORM: anema su kindri nu tjaivililj?
anema so kindri no tjaivililj?
S.TRANSL: 您保留哪些權利?
What rights do you keep?

S.FORM: tisun avananga izua a kindri pakatua su ziriu sakamaya.
tison avananga izoa a kindri pakatoa so zirio sakamaya.
S.TRANSL: 您仍然是您的語料的作者及擁 有者。
You remain the author and owner of your data.

S.FORM: a FormosanBank tjara kiteku tu tisun angata puanema.
a FormosanBank tjara kiteko to tison angata poanema.
S.TRANSL: FormosanBank 會承認您是語 料的作者及擁有者。
acknowledge you as the author and owner of your data.

S.FORM: timaimanga nu cemekaw tua su ziriu tjara kiteku tu nisun a pukindri.
timaimanga no cemekaw toa so zirio tjara kiteko to nison a pokindri.
S.TRANSL: 任何使用您資料的人必須承認 您是資料的作者及擁有者。
Anyone who uses your data must acknowledge you as the author and owner of the data.

S.FORM: amin sun maqati a paveli ta su tjinaucikel a caucau.
amin son maqati a paveli ta so tjinaocikel a caocao.
S.TRANSL: 您仍然是唯一可以銷售您的語 料的人。
You remain the only person who can sell your data.

S.FORM: anema pasusuan? kemuda itjen a pakakuda?
anema pasosoan? kemoda itjen a pakakoda?
S.TRANSL: 流程是什麼?這是如何運作的?
What is the process? How does this work?

S.FORM: tjara nia kivadaqan sun tua pakata su tjaucikel kata kemuda cemikilu tua mareka su vinarungan tu uli tja kudai. aicu palemek izua:
tjara nia kivadaqan son toa pakata so tjaocikel kata kemoda cemikilo toa mareka so vinarongan to oli tja kodai. aico palemek izoa:
S.TRANSL: 我們會與您討論您的語料以及 您設置的任何限制條件，這些可能包括:
We discuss your data with you, along with any constraints you have. These may include:

S.FORM: maqati amen a pusaladj tua maqilja mareka vavecikan itua su ziriu. maqati amen a kemaljava itua tiningcu a zikang a pekeljang a pusaladj qemayam kemin sa semanguaq ta pasaliw itua tjaucikel.
maqati amen a posaladj toa maqilja mareka vavecikan itoa so zirio. maqati amen a kemaljava itoa tiningco a zikang a pekeljang a posaladj qemayam kemin sa semangoaq ta pasaliw itoa tjaocikel.
S.TRANSL: 我們可以幫助匿名化語料中的某些部分。我們可以等到特定日期後再發布語料。我們可以幫助查找並修正語料中的錯誤。
We can help anonymize some part of the data. We can wait to publish the data until after a specific date. We can help look for and fix mistakes in the data.

S.FORM: saljinga sun tu aza na sacemekaw ta ziriu pacaculu kata su wanglu? tuki saljinga tiamadju dikilu a kipakim tua su mareka lunbun?
saljinga son to aza na sacemekaw ta zirio pacacolo kata so wanglo? toki saljinga tiamadjo dikilo a kipakim toa so mareka lonbon?
S.TRANSL: 您可以決定您的工作如何得到承認。是否希望使用者連結到 您的網站? 是否希望引用您的 某篇論文?
You decide how you want your work to be acknowledged. Should users link to your website? Should they cite a paper of yours?

S.FORM: pavai amen ta su ziriu.
pavai amen ta so zirio.
S.TRANSL: 您將語料提供給我們。
You send us the data.

S.FORM: uli mapavalit tua su ziriu itua namaljaluay a vinecikan.
oli mapavalit toa so zirio itoa namaljaloay a vinecikan.
S.TRANSL: 我們將資料轉換為FormosanBank 格式。
We convert the data into FormosanBank format.

S.FORM: tjara nia kigaljui a qemayam a su ziriu, mapaqulid tu neka pasaliw. nu pu'ui sun, maqati sun a ljemizaw tua su tjaucikel.
tjara nia kigaljoi a qemayam a so zirio, mapaqolid to neka pasaliw. no po'oi son, maqati son a ljemizaw toa so tjaocikel.
S.TRANSL: 我們會仔細檢查資料，確保沒有錯誤。如果您願意，您也可以審查語料。
We carefully check the data to make sure there are no errors. If you wish, you can also review the data.

S.FORM: tjara nia sinan pazangal a su ziriu masanitalj itua FormosanBank sa mazepzep a patjumalj.
tjara nia sinan pazangal a so zirio masanitalj itoa FormosanBank sa mazepzep a patjomalj.
S.TRANSL: 我們將語料視 FormosanBank 的一部分進行發布。
We publish the data as part of FormosanBank.

S.FORM: avansika namaitucu a kai pakatua nia sengsengan. napaljakev tua su manguaqan, sa tjara mapasusu tua su vinarungan.
avansika namaitoco a kai pakatoa nia sengsengan. napaljakev toa so mangoaqan, sa tjara mapasoso toa so vinarongan.
S.TRANSL: 以上是為了確保您的語料依照 您的意願進行共享，並保護您的權益。
This ensures your data is shared with the world in a way that aligns with your wishes and protects your rights.
